summary: Prove package-installed runtime identity and release v0.3.4
description: Make doctor accept an immutable VCS package installation when PEP 610 direct_url provenance proves the requested tag and resolved commit, while preserving strict source-checkout behavior. Release and publish v0.3.4 without GitHub Actions.
acceptance: R-1: A package install with valid PEP 610 VCS provenance for the required immutable tag reports exact_ref=true and ready=true without a Git checkout.
R-2: Missing malformed mismatched or non-VCS package provenance remains fail-closed and source-checkout exact-tag behavior is unchanged.
R-3: Runtime version package metadata docs tests and distribution checks consistently identify 0.3.4 and v0.3.4.
R-4: Local Linux and release gates pass; annotated v0.3.4 resolves to the release commit; a fresh uv tool install from the public tag passes doctor without GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV.
R-5: GitHub Release v0.3.4 is published and remote main tag release metadata are verified without GitHub Actions.

evidence.summary: v0.3.4 payload e3fc0adb352eeda9a69e04890486db1eb49482b7; annotated tag object 8dbaa31d61dd63c2b35ac7d95375d1fb849651c4 peels to payload; local Linux/WSL 84 passed; public-tag uv install doctor ready=true exact_ref=true identity_source=pep610-vcs development_override=false with Hermes 0.18.2; doctor sha256 dc530398f6549a0b1ca0fad1bf9bfa7227f009ecb4aa8afad3c8d3e3b94a0e1b; direct_url sha256 31f139ce1c1b502f66a63410b0e36ae34ccc8c034391780a6e3efaae215307b5; GitHub Release published and read back; GitHub Actions unused
